title: [lora_l2.c:618] lichen_lora_l2_tx length type mismatch with lora_send
description: Function: lichen_lora_l2_tx. Contract violation: The function takes 'size_t len' but lora_send() takes 'uint32_t len'. On 64-bit platforms, size_t is 64 bits while uint32_t is 32 bits. The check 'len > LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD' (255) prevents overflow in practice, but there's no explicit cast at the lora_send() call site (line 688). If LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD ever increased above UINT32_MAX (impossible in practice), truncation would occur. Priority 3 - theoretical concern, not a real bug.
close_reason: Fixed: Added explicit cast from size_t to uint32_t when calling lora_send(), with comment explaining why the cast is safe (len is validated <= 255)
